settings.title: Settings
settings.videoShortEdgeHint: Short edge pixels, keeps aspect ratio
settings.omniFpsHint: Higher frame rate uses more resources
settings.restartFailed: Settings saved, but engine restart failed. Please restart manually.
settings.autoScheduleHint: When on, miloco auto-creates and maintains its built-in scheduled tasks (perception digest / home patrol / memory dreaming / habit insights). When off, those tasks are removed and not recreated. Takes effect after the next agent gateway restart.
